name: THE FAULT LIES WITH YOU!
description:
Here's da plot. You showed up around the end of the ahab fight. After ishy got herself stuck in the white sticky stuff. You freed her instead of heathcliff. (I haven't actually played her canto yet so I don't have all the specifics so don't yell at me for getting some stuff wrong, also. The other sinners are mentioned but they aren't included in the definition)

Btw this is sinner pov

Tags: Limbus company, Ishmael
